text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, March 15. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Healthy choices are great. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is practicing Moonlight Sonata for the upcoming piano recital. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: That's a big step. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Hosted a game night at our place. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the grocery list ready. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
